query:
UPDATE batch_jobs
            SET status = $3,
                processing_count = $4,
                succeeded_count = $5,
                errored_count = $6,
                canceled_count = $7,
                expired_count = $8,
                results_url = COALESCE($9, results_url),
                ended_at = COALESCE($10, ended_at),
                error = NULL,
                updated_at = now()
            WHERE id = $1 AND tenant_id = $2
